title: CPU Library seed — flagship dies with schematic text

detailed.label: ARM Cortex-A78
detailed.address_map: EL0 userspace 0x0000_0000–0xFFFF_FFFF · EL1 kernel TTBR0/TTBR1 · GIC-600 MMIO 0x0800_0000
detailed.schematic_blueprint: Superscalar decode → 4-wide dispatch · L1I 64KiB / L1D 64KiB · L2 256KiB–512KiB · NEON FP pipeline · CCI mesh to DRAM
detailed.ai_detail: Mobile big-core template — high IPC, moderate thermals; pairs with A55 little cluster in DynamIQ.

detailed.label: Apple M4
detailed.address_map: Unified memory 0x8000_0000_0000 band · Apple GPU tile MMIO · ANE NPU queue doorbell 0x2_4000_0000
detailed.schematic_blueprint: 4P+6E Firestorm-class cores · 10-core GPU · 16-core Neural Engine · Secure Enclave island · Thunderbolt/USB4 PHY south
detailed.ai_detail: Mac + iPad Pro die — field_opt guest when CHIPS accurate path enabled.

detailed.label: Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Gen 3
detailed.address_map: Modem DSP TCM 0x2000_0000 · Kryo Prime 0x0 · Adreno register file 0x5000_0000
detailed.schematic_blueprint: 1× Cortex-X4 prime · 5× A720 · 2× A520 · Adreno 750 · Hexagon NPU · 5G modem DSP
detailed.ai_detail: Android flagship SoC — big.LITTLE thermal ladder maps to combinatorics narrow band 0.

detailed.label: Intel Core Ultra 9 285K
detailed.address_map: Legacy hole 0–1MiB · MMIO 0xFED0_0000 APIC · PCIe ECAM 0xE000_0000
detailed.schematic_blueprint: 8P Lion Cove + 16E Skymont · Xe-LPG graphics · NPU 13 TOPS · Ring bus to DDR5
detailed.ai_detail: Arrow Lake desktop — host FieldX86 die posture for organized .launch.

detailed.label: AMD Ryzen 9 9950X
detailed.address_map: CCX local APIC · SMU mailbox 0x0005_0000 · Infinity Fabric hub
detailed.schematic_blueprint: 2× CCD Zen 5 · 16C/32T · 64MiB L3 · RDNA null (desktop IO die) · DDR5 dual-channel
detailed.ai_detail: Native host ceiling for belt_2_0 combinatorics when thermals allow.

detailed.label: Cyrix 6x86
detailed.schematic_blueprint: RISC86 core · 64-bit internal bus · MMX scaffold · 16KiB L1 · 133MHz bus
detailed.ai_detail: Queen host CPU option — MMX path for DOS/Win9x guests.

detailed.label: Motorola MC6809E
detailed.schematic_blueprint: 6809E + SAM6883 + MC6847 VDG · SN76489 PSG · WD1793 FDC on CoCo2
detailed.ai_detail: CoCo/CoCo2 CPU die — CHIPS scaffold with narrow band path prediction.

detailed.label: MOS 6502
detailed.schematic_blueprint: Accumulator ISA · illegal opcode table · 2C02 PPU bus on NES
detailed.ai_detail: CHIPS hot path — opcode dispatch vectorized in FieldChips6502.hpp.
